description: Create a task-switching experiment (Rogers & Monsell, 1995) in PsychoPy Builder, saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/task_switching.psyexp, using a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/task_switching_conditions.csv. The conditions file must contain 64 trials following an AABB task pattern (magnitude, magnitude, parity, parity) with columns for task, digit (integers 1-4 and 6-9), correctResp (magnitude: 'left' if < 5, 'right' if > 5; parity: 'left' if even, 'right' if odd), trialType ('first' for row 1, 'switch' if task changes, 'repeat' if same), cueText ('MAGNITUDE' or 'PARITY'), and cueColor ('blue' or 'green'). The experiment must include routines for instructions, fixation (0.5s), trial, feedback, and thanks. The trial routine requires a cue text component ($cueText, $cueColor, y=0.15, 0s to 0.3s), a target digit ($digit, 0.3s to infinite), and a keyboard response (left/right, starting at 0.3s, storing correctResp). The 'trials' loop must wrap the fixation, trial, and feedback routines using sequential trial ordering from the CSV conditions file.
